$schema-note: Mmm! brand design tokens — single source of truth for the Shopify theme (Dawn fork). Rendered into CSS custom properties by theme/assets/mmm-brand.css. Any visual change starts here.

sunrise-orange.role: Primary brand / CTA. The morning. Subscribe buttons, active states, highlights.

sunrise-orange-deep.role: Hover/pressed state for primary CTAs; small text on warm white (AA).

fresh-green.role: Secondary accent. Vitality, confirmation, in-stock, success states.

fresh-green-deep.role: Hover state for green elements; green text on warm white (AA).

soft-violet.role: Tertiary accent. Calm/rest cues (Aah, sleep, stress segments); quiz UI.

soft-violet-deep.role: Violet text on warm white (AA); hover state.

warm-white-raised.role: Cards and raised surfaces on warm white.

ink.role: Primary text. Warm near-black, never pure #000.

ink-soft.role: Secondary text, captions, the DSHEA disclaimer.

display.usage: Headlines, product names, quiz questions, the word Mmm!

body.usage: Body copy, UI labels, buttons, disclaimers.
